expectations.text: DDD contains actual hex color codes (#XXXXXX format)
DDD names specific font families, not generic 'sans-serif'
expectations.evidence: DDD names Inter for headlines/body and JetBrains Mono for code/monospace

expectations.text: DDD has specific pixel values for spacing and font sizes
DDD specifies at most 2 font families
expectations.evidence: Two font families: Inter (headlines + body) and JetBrains Mono (code/CLI). Only 2 families.

expectations.text: All spacing values in DDD are multiples of 8
expectations.evidence: Spacing scale includes 12px (space-3) and 80px (space-12) and 120px (space-16). While 80 and 120 are multiples of 8, 12px is not a multiple of 8 (12/8 = 1.5)

expectations.text: Build plan contains forge CLI commands
expectations.evidence: Build plan contains ~150 forge commands including forge insert frame, forge insert text, forge style, forge set-layout, forge insert stack, forge move

expectations.text: Build plan includes forge screenshot after sections
Build plan covers all 5 requested sections: hero, features grid, social proof, pricing, footer
expectations.evidence: Build plan has Phase 2: Hero Section, Phase 3: Social Proof Logos, Phase 4: Features Grid (3x2), Phase 5: Pricing Table (3 tiers), Phase 6: Footer
